name: Kimi Code CLI
local_observations: This repository treats .kimi-code/skills and .kimi-code/mcp.json as project-local Kimi surfaces, but the exact installed Kimi config search path should be verified in each environment.
mcp: Use the installed Kimi MCP configuration surface and verify tool visibility before relying on it.
permissions: Prefer plan mode until authority and stop conditions are explicit; use auto mode only for bounded implementation.
autonomy: Use non-interactive or auto execution with step limits and checkpoints.
evidence_capture: Capture CLI output, generated artifacts, and KBD waypoint transitions.
handoff: Use phase artifacts and KBD state so another harness can resume.
recovery: If Kimi config behavior differs locally, label it unverified and fall back to project instructions plus explicit prompts.
public_boundary_verification: The Kimi producer path needs the same public-boundary proof and independent critic as other harnesses.
